TechnologyStack.Runtime: Python 3.12 is the sole strategic runtime. Phase-15 Wave-15-3 (MP-LEGACY-DEPRECATION) removed the Node.js sandbox + docx-js/pptxgenjs/exceljs path entirely; the legacy optional fallback engine is gone. Tier=frontier python code is invoked via direct trusted import; the eventual RestrictedPython sandbox lands in handover §6 Phase-4.

dep.name: python-docx
dep.purpose: DOCX construction backbone for the Pure Python Edition (Phase-7 onward); MP-DOCUMENT.save uses it for paragraph/table primitives, drops down to lxml for cover and header/footer

dep.name: pillow
dep.purpose: Image embed + format probing for MP-CONTENT.Image (Phase-7 onward)

dep.name: lxml
dep.purpose: OOXML parsing, validation, style extraction, GRACE injection; also direct-write fallback for parts python-docx doesn't expose

dep.name: fastmcp
dep.purpose: MCP tool server for LLM integration

dep.name: gotenberg-client
dep.purpose: PDF/PNG rendering via Gotenberg for QA

dep.name: librechat
dep.purpose: Multi-model UI with MCP and Artifacts support

dep.name: matplotlib
dep.purpose: Chart rendering backend for MP-CHART (Phase-8 onward); rendered to PNG @ 300 DPI; corporate theme + chartjunk removal applied via rcParams; backend forced to 'Agg' for headless test runners

dep.name: seaborn
dep.purpose: Convenience wrapper for Chart.from_seaborn (Phase-8); lazy-imported only when called — NOT a hard dep

dep.name: plotly
dep.purpose: Source for Chart.from_plotly (Phase-12); user-supplied plotly.graph_objs.Figure converted to PNG via plotly.io.to_image; lazy-imported, raises ImportError with `pip install plotly kaleido` hint when missing — NOT a hard dep

dep.name: kaleido
dep.purpose: PNG export backend used by plotly.io.to_image in Chart.from_plotly (Phase-12); lazy-imported via plotly's call chain; without kaleido, plotly fig.to_image raises and Chart.from_plotly surfaces it as ImportError with kaleido install hint — NOT a hard dep

future-dep.name: RestrictedPython
future-dep.purpose: Phase-4 (handover §6): sandbox for tier=frontier python tier execution; not added in Phase-15

constraint.reason: Custom XML Part manipulation relies on lxml 5.x API
Stable paragraph/table API surface used by MP-DOCUMENT.save

module-level.focus: Fast deterministic unit and contract checks per module

wave-level.focus: End-to-end flows: skill → model → execute → validate → output

phase-level.focus: Full regression across the pure-python runtime

Testing.mocking-policy: Prefer fakes for model responses and file fixtures over mocking internal APIs.

Observability.logger: Python stdlib logging + structlog for JSON output
Observability.redaction: Never log model API keys, user document content, or raw OOXML payloads exceeding 10KB.

DeliveryShape.shape: Three-container Docker Compose: LibreChat (UI), MINT (pure-Python MCP server), Gotenberg (render). Optional fourth container for local model (Ollama/vLLM). Single docker-compose up.
